creator: robertames@hotmail.com
text:
Upon further examination, I better understand the issue.  It seems executing the single command "make all install package" fails to build the package.  While doing it as two commands "make all install" followed by "make package" works.  I must have run the commands differently after updating the port.  The port on the install media is the same as what I checked out through svn.

I'm guessing "make all install package" isn't the proper was to do this and I should use two commands.  I tried a different port and had the same issue.  So this can stay closed (didn't know I could close it) since I am able to successfully make the package.
